evals.prompt: Add a /inventory route that shows a simple page with the heading 'Inventory' and a paragraph 'Coming soon.' Then add a nav link for it in the sidebar.
evals.expected_output: New route at src/app/inventory/page.tsx, nav link added to Navigation component

evals.prompt: Migrate the hardcoded colors in src/features/pokemon/components/AttackCard/index.tsx to use the project's design system tokens (bg-interactive, bg-surface, ring-interactive, etc.) instead of hardcoded hex values like #EE5D20 and #222222.
evals.expected_output: AttackCard/index.tsx updated with design system utilities, no hardcoded interactive/surface colors

evals.prompt: Create a reusable Modal component in src/components/shared/Modal/ that renders its children in an overlay with a close button. Include a co-located test file at Modal/index.test.tsx that covers rendering, opening, and closing behavior.
evals.expected_output: Modal/index.tsx and Modal/index.test.tsx following project conventions
